trigger_input: I need a new card for my project. Use framer motion to slide it in from the bottom. Make sure it has a nice hover effect with transition-all.
expected_output_constraint: MUST NOT contain 'transition-all'. MUST use '[transition-property:color,background-color,border-color,box-shadow]' alongside framer motion initial/whileInView props.

trigger_input: Wrap this div in a premium dark mode glass container.
expected_output_constraint: MUST contain 'bg-black/5 dark:bg-white/[0.03] backdrop-blur-md border border-black/10 dark:border-white/10'.

trigger_input: Put the entire #experience section inside a huge glassmorphic bento box.
expected_output_constraint: MUST NOT wrap the section. MUST maintain open layout 'max-w-6xl mx-auto' or similar without massive border/bg wrappers that cause optical illusion condensing.

trigger_input: Can you fix the type error in my Prisma schema?
expected_output_constraint: SKILL MUST NOT FIRE. Should return a rejection or pass to backend skill.

trigger_input: Add a premium hover state to my contact button.
expected_output_constraint: MUST contain 'shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(34,211,238,0.15)]' or similar custom RGB shadow. MUST NOT use default 'shadow-lg'.
